feed.title: SAP Community - PLM EAM/Plant Maintenance
feed.subtitle: PLM EAM/Plant Maintenance Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Scheduling parameters usage & what is forward scheduling & backward scheduling in maintenance orders
entry.content:
Dear Sir,

I have doubts regarding the topic Scheduling parameters while configuring the maintenance order types.

What are Scheduling parameters & what is forward scheduling & backward scheduling in maintenance orders.

What is the meaning of scheduling type.

What is the meaning of production supervisor *, while doing the configuration of maintenance order scheduling setting.

What is the difference between automatic scheduling, automatic log, scheduling with breaks, shift order, latest staging date.

 

Regards,

Arif

entry.title: Auto close/update all open Notifications work orders and maintenance plans for Decommissioned asset
entry.content: How we can achieve this please let me know

entry.title: Maintenance Order Components - PR should create with Equipment serial numbers.
entry.content:
Hi Guru's

Equipments are maintained with the serial numbers. If any maintenance order created with components for the equipment. PR need to be created for the components with equipment serial number. Then vendor will provide the appropriate components based on the equipment serial number for the PR. Is there any solution to fulfill the above business process?

entry.title: MB51 report
entry.content:
Hi,

In MB51 we are not getting cost center for which we have issued (261) goods against maintenance order

i have tried with query by linking table VIAFKOS MSEG and MKPF but in this i am getting output only for material issue against maintenance order (261) and not 201 which we have issued some material against cost center.

how can we get a report like MB51 which also contains cost center for GI agnst maintenance order?

entry.title: Differences between SAP MRS , FSM and RSH
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We are working on a requirement for  Resource Scheduling for one of our client.

SAP has 3 products available i.e. MRS , FSM and RSH.

Can someone tell me what are the usages of those and the differences between them? 

Thanks and Regards,

S Kumar

entry.title: PPE tcode
entry.content:
Hi, 

I want to update source code in PPE transaction. is there any bapi or function module to update?

Thnx in advance 🙂

entry.title: How i select work center category 5 for plant maintenance
entry.content: Hi expert in transaction IR01 i have the next problem when i tried to select work center category for plant maintenance.

entry.title: Proactive Order (YA02) is not generating with Notifiction type (Y2) and giving error while schedulin
entry.content:
Hello All,

Proactive Order (YA02) is not generating with Notification type (Y2) and giving error while scheduling from Maintenance Plan. Client do not want to generate Notification as call object. Requirement is to generate Order as call object. While generating it is giving APRQ error. Process is working fine if we are generating notification first and creating order manually. Is it possible to generate order and skip the approval part for notification or we can do auto approval while creation. Kindly suggest.

Regards

Yogesh Sharma

entry.title: Equipment/Functional location Manufacturer Serial number --> Order --> PR
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

Equipment/Functional location has manufacturer serial number. Maintenance order is created for the equipment/Functional location with spare parts. Dependent requirement was generated against the order for all spare parts. After MRP run, Purchase Requisition was generated for spares.

In Purchase Requisition, we need to map the equipment/Functional location manufacturer serial number.

Business process:

Vendor will see the manufacturer serial number in the PR and provide the exact spare parts based on the manufacturer serial number.

Is there any way to flow the equipment/functional location manufacturer serial number to PR?

entry.title: NOTIFICATION FOR FAILED MEASURING POINT VALUES
entry.content:
When doing a Plant Maintenance Work Order confirmation and recording Failed Notifications against more than one Measuring Point on the Technical Object, Only one Notification (type M9) is raised for the Confirmation with the description matching the Text entered for the last failed measuring point. Our business wants one (for better or worse) per failed Measuring point.
i.e. 3 Fails => 3 notifications.

Is this possible and if so how?

Regards

Seamus Norris

entry.title: how to change the equipment structure
How to find the budget of the PM orders instead of finding them in IMR1 report ?
entry.content: Can anyone tell me how to check the budget of the pm orders instead of finding them in IMR1 report

entry.title: How to fetch follow on order in SAP PM
entry.content:
How to fetch follow on order in SAP PM.

Can we remove maintenance item from Maintenance plans once equipment status set inactive.

entry.title: how to show description order in print out
entry.content:
hi expert,

in iw32 there are description order, how to show description order in print out, this case is configuration or modification program? 

thank u

#plant maintennce #order #iw32

entry.title: how to show tab revision in notification
entry.content:
hi expert

i have requirement to show field revision and tab revision in notification bellow tab reference object?how can i get it? i try in spro screen notification it's not work ? there is another step? 

 

thank u

entry.title: Increase the useful life of an asset with a new depreciation key interval
entry.content:
Hi All,

Lets say, there is an asset with value 10,000 EUR with a scrap value of 1000, EUR and Useful life of 5 years (Straight line). In the 5th year, when the asset gets to its scrap value of 1000 EUR, we want to extend the Useful life of the asset by lets say 2 years and then depreciate it fully per straight line (500 EUR per year) . Can we achieve this by adding a new interval ? I added a new interval but it doesnt extend the useful life of the asset and depreciates fully in 5th year

Kind regards

Gitank

entry.title: inventory listing by SKU for Company Code
entry.content:
Dear Friends,

Please let me know how to obtain the inventory listing by SKU for Company Code 1390 for profit center 273346? User likes to know how much is the collateral balance vs saleable inventory.


Please suggest.

Regards
Sridhar

entry.title: Assign different functional locations at tasklist level
entry.content:
Hello experts, 

I have this requirements: 

the client wants to create a work order from a maintenance plan, that will have different functional locations defined for each operations. So the request is the possibility to define, for each operation inside a tasklist, a specific functional location/equipment.

I know that there is the possibility to assign a functional location for each operation from the "object list" inside the work order, but the request is to define different FLs for each operations inside the tasklist...because then, they wants to create this kind of WO from a maintenance plan (tied to that particular tasklist).

Thank you so much,

entry.title: Impact convertion ECC to S/4HANA in SAP Plant Maintenance (PM)
entry.content:
Hi,

A client that wants to convert from ECC to S/4HANA, what impacts does this have on the Plant Maintenance (PM) module?
This in a Brownfiled conversion.


Are there tables that change?
Are there transactions that will be obsolete?

Best Regards,

Daniel

entry.title: Catalogs used in Maintenance Notification
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Can you please let us know other than the standard 5 catalogs what are the catalogs used for Notifications in Plant Maintenance?

Regards,

Preeti
